---
title: "QMEEProject_MomPupInteractions_StatsAnalyses"
author: "Tang Tang & Iman"
date: "2026-03-13"
output: html_document
---

## Library
```{r include = FALSE}

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(tidyr)
library(patchwork)

library(lme4)
library(glmmTMB)
library(DHARMa)
library(splines)
library(ggeffects)
library(MASS)


```

```{r}

MomPupBehav <- readRDS("MomPupInteractionBehav_CumulativeDataset.rds")
summary(MomPupBehav)

```

## Mom/Pup Initiation (done?)

### DataFrame
```{r}

MomPupInitiation_behavs <- c("MOM INITIATION", "PUP INITIATION")

MomPupInitiation <- MomPupBehav %>% 
  filter(Behaviour %in% MomPupInitiation_behavs) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-Duration_s, -Stop_s, -Start_s, -BehaviourType, -Subject)

```

```{r warning = FALSE}

MomPupInitiation_model_00 <- glm(
  Behaviour ~ Condition * PND,
  data = MomPupInitiation, 
  family = binomial(link = "logit"))

MomPupInitiation_model_01 <- glmer(
  Behaviour ~ Condition * PND +
    (1|MomID/PupID),
  data = MomPupInitiation, 
  family = binomial(link = "logit"))

MomPupInitiation_model_02 <- glmer(
  Behaviour ~ Condition * PND +
    (1+PND|MomID) + (1|PupID),
  data = MomPupInitiation, 
  family = binomial(link = "logit")) 

MomPupInitiation_model_03 <- glmer(
  Behaviour ~ Condition * PND +
    (1+PND|MomID) + (1+Condition|PupID),
  data = MomPupInitiation, 
  family = binomial(link = "logit")) # ding ?

anova(MomPupInitiation_model_03, MomPupInitiation_model_02)

plot(simulateResiduals(MomPupInitiation_model_03))
plot(simulateResiduals(MomPupInitiation_model_02))



summary(MomPupInitiation_model_02)

```




## Unsuccessful AND Successful Attachments

### Dataframe for Unsuccessful Attachments
```{r}

AttachmentFreq_behavs <- c("UNSUCCESSFUL ATTACHMENT", "SUCCESSFUL ATTACHMENT")

Success_Unsuccess <- MomPupBehav %>% 
  filter(Behaviour %in% AttachmentFreq_behavs) %>% 
  group_by(Behaviour, MomID, Rater, Condition, PND, ObservationID, PupID) %>%
  summarise(
    freq = sum(!is.na(Start_s)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


Success_Unsuccess_Wide <- Success_Unsuccess %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Behaviour,
    values_from = freq,
    values_fill = NA) %>% 
  mutate(total = `SUCCESSFUL ATTACHMENT` + `UNSUCCESSFUL ATTACHMENT`,
         prop_success = `SUCCESSFUL ATTACHMENT`/total)


Success_Unsuccess_Wide2 <- Success_Unsuccess_Wide %>%
  mutate(
    `SUCCESSFUL ATTACHMENT`   = tidyr::replace_na(`SUCCESSFUL ATTACHMENT`, 0),
    `UNSUCCESSFUL ATTACHMENT` = tidyr::replace_na(`UNSUCCESSFUL ATTACHMENT`, 0),
    total = `SUCCESSFUL ATTACHMENT` + `UNSUCCESSFUL ATTACHMENT`
  ) %>%
  filter(total > 0)

```

```{r}

PropSuccessModel_00 <- glm(
  cbind(`SUCCESSFUL ATTACHMENT`,
        `UNSUCCESSFUL ATTACHMENT`) ~ Condition * PND,
    data = Success_Unsuccess_Wide2,
  family = binomial(link = "logit"))

PropSuccessModel_01 <- glmer(
  cbind(`SUCCESSFUL ATTACHMENT`,
        `UNSUCCESSFUL ATTACHMENT`) ~ Condition * PND +
    (1|PupID),
    data = Success_Unsuccess_Wide2,
  family = binomial(link = "logit"))

PropSuccessModel_02 <- glmer(
  cbind(`SUCCESSFUL ATTACHMENT`,
        `UNSUCCESSFUL ATTACHMENT`) ~ Condition * PND +
    (1+Condition|PupID),
    data = Success_Unsuccess_Wide2,
  family = binomial(link = "logit")) # i feel like it should be this one


anova(PropSuccessModel_01, PropSuccessModel_02)

plot(simulateResiduals(PropSuccessModel_02)) 
performance::check_model(PropSuccessModel_02)

summary(PropSuccessModel_02)

```


## Mom Acceptance/Resistance (done? me thinks)

### Dataframe
```{r}

Resist_Accept_behavs <- c("ACCEPTANCE", "RESISTANCE")

Accept_Resist <- MomPupBehav %>% 
  filter(Behaviour %in% Resist_Accept_behavs) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-Duration_s, -Stop_s, -Start_s, -BehaviourType, -Subject)

```

### Diagnostics
```{r warning = FALSE}

AcceptanceResistance_model_00 <- glm(
  Behaviour ~ Condition * PND,
  data = Accept_Resist, 
  family = binomial(link = "logit")) 

AcceptanceResistance_model_01 <- glmer( 
  Behaviour ~ Condition * PND +
    (1+PND|MomID) +
    (1 | PupID) +
    (1|Rater),  data = Accept_Resist, 
  family = binomial(link = "logit"))

AcceptanceResistance_model_02 <- glmer( 
  Behaviour ~ Condition * PND +
    (1+PND|MomID) +
    (1 + Condition | PupID) +
    (1|Rater),  data = Accept_Resist, 
  family = binomial(link = "logit"))

anova(AcceptanceResistance_model_02, AcceptanceResistance_model_01)

performance::check_model(AcceptanceResistance_model_02)
plot(simulateResiduals(AcceptanceResistance_model_00))
plot(simulateResiduals(AcceptanceResistance_model_01))
plot(simulateResiduals(AcceptanceResistance_model_02))

summary(AcceptanceResistance_model_02)

# 1+Pup:Condition? naur

```



## Guidance 

### Dataframe
```{r}

Guidance <- MomPupBehav %>%
  filter(Behaviour == "GUIDANCE")

Guidance2 <- Guidance %>%
  group_by(MomID, Rater, Condition, PND, ObservationID, PupID) %>%
  summarise(
    freq = sum(!is.na(Start_s)),
    dur  = sum(Duration_s, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


```

```{r}

# frequency 

GuidanceModel_00 <- glm(
  freq ~ Condition * PND,
    data = Guidance2,
  family = quasipoisson(link = "log"))

GuidanceModel_01 <- glmmTMB(
  freq ~ Condition * PND,
    data = Guidance2,
  family = nbinom2)

GuidanceModel_02 <- glmmTMB(
  freq ~ Condition * PND +
    (1+PND|MomID) +
    (1+Condition|PupID),
    data = Guidance2,
  family = nbinom2) ## use this one? for now

GuidanceModel_03 <- glm.nb(
  freq ~ Condition * PND,
    data = Guidance2)

GuidanceModel_04 <- glmer.nb(
  freq ~ Condition * PND +
    (1+PND|MomID) +
    (1+Condition|PupID),
    data = Guidance2)


plot(GuidanceModel_00)
plot(simulateResiduals(GuidanceModel_00))
performance::check_model(GuidanceModel_00)

plot(simulateResiduals(GuidanceModel_01))
plot(simulateResiduals(GuidanceModel_02))
plot(simulateResiduals(GuidanceModel_03))


anova(GuidanceModel_01, GuidanceModel_02)


```

```{r}

GuidanceDurModel_00 <- glm(
  dur ~ Condition * PND,
    data = Guidance2,
  family = Gamma)

GuidanceDurModel_00 <- glmmTMB(
  dur ~ Condition * PND,
    data = Guidance2,
  family = gamma(link="log"))




GuidanceDur_binom <- glmer(
  dur > 0 ~ Condition * PND +
    (1+PND | MomID) +
    (1+Condition | PupID),
  family = binomial(link = "logit"),
  data = Guidance2)

plot(simulateResiduals(GuidanceDur_binom))

  
  GuidanceDuration_pos <- Guidance2 %>%
  filter(dur > 0)

GuidanceDur_gamma <- glmmTMB(
  dur ~ Condition * PND +
    (1+PND | MomID) +
    (1+Condition | PupID) +
    (1|Rater),
  family = Gamma(link = "log"),
  data = GuidanceDuration_pos
)

plot(simulateResiduals(GuidanceDur_gamma, group = GuidanceDuration_pos$PND))

plot(simulateResiduals(GuidanceDur_gamma, val = "zero"))
# perfor


```



## First Contact:

### Dataframe
```{r}

FirstTouch <- MomPupBehav %>% 
  filter(Behaviour == "FIRST TOUCH") %>% 
  select(MomID, PupID, Behaviour, PND, ObservationID, Condition, Rater)




Accept_Resist <- MomPupBehav %>% 
  filter(Behaviour %in% Resist_Accept_behavs) %>% 
  select(-Duration_s, -Stop_s, -Start_s, -BehaviourType, -Subject)


%>% 
  select(-Stop_s, -Start_s, -BehaviourType, -Subject)



  group_by(Behaviour, MomID, Rater, Condition, PND, ObservationID, PupID) %>%
  summarise(
    freq = sum(!is.na(Duration_s)),
    .groups = "drop")

```
